components.name: Window
components.explanation: Root window container. Uses flex-column layout.

components.name: Header
components.explanation: Height = padding(8) + content(28) + padding(8) + divider(1) = 45px. Uses flex-row with items-center.

components.name: SearchInput
components.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining space. Width = window(750) - padding(16) - buttons_area(200) = 534px. Vertically centered in header.

components.name: ContentArea
components.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining height after header. Uses flex-row to create side-by-side panels.

components.name: ScriptList
components.explanation: Width = 50% of window = 375px. Uses uniform_list for virtualized scrolling with 40px item height.

components.name: PreviewPanel
components.explanation: Width = remaining 50% = 375px. Has 16px padding on all sides.

components.name: ListItem[0]
components.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

components.name: ListItem[1]
components.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

components.name: ListItem[2]
components.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

components.name: ListItem[3]
components.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

components.name: ListItem[4]
components.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

components.name: LogoButton
components.explanation: Fixed 20px width. Positioned at right edge with 16px margin.

components.name: ActionsButton
components.explanation: Width = 85px. Positioned left of logo with 24px spacing (includes divider).

components.name: RunButton
components.explanation: Width = 55px. Positioned left of Actions with 24px spacing.
